privileged_info_summary: The hepatitis dataset contains 155 total records with 32 deaths (class=1) and 123 survivors (class=2). The data is real clinical research data from 1988, sourced from Carnegie-Mellon University via the UCI Machine Learning Repository. The task requires filtering this data to extract only the 32 deceased patients and exporting them to a CSV file.
